esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Connection errors are a monotonic counter; use INCREASE for delta over the time window
| WHERE metrics.mysql.connection.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.mysql.connection.errors))
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint, attributes.error
// Alert when more than 5 connection errors in the window; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE increase > 5
| SORT increase DESC
